arts.ttl: “I had negotiations with Tottenham” – Defender reveals Spurs efforts to sign him from Southampton
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur and Paris Saint-Germain made attempts to sign Cédric Soares when he was at Southampton. That’s according to the right-back himself, and he revealed this during a chat with DAZN in Portugal and Notícias ao Minuto have relayed his comments.
